title: QFINHUB Outreach Reply Handling Rules

rules.scenario: POSITIVE REPLY — Prospect wants the widget
action: Respond within 24 hours
Provide the iframe embed code (copy from widget page)
Offer custom sizing if needed (width/height adjustments)
Give short explanation: free, no signup, no data collection
Mention the attribution link is built into the widget
DO NOT push SEO anchor text or exact-match links
DO NOT ask for dofollow links
If they ask about attribution: 'The widget includes a small QFINHUB link — it helps others discover our free calculators too'

rules.scenario: POSITIVE REPLY — Prospect wants more details
action: Reply with publisher benefits: keep visitors on site, 100% free, mobile responsive
Include privacy/safety details: no data collected, all calculations client-side
Mention it works with WordPress, Squarespace, Wix, Webflow, custom HTML
Link to widget page for full FAQ
Thank them politely for considering
Mark CLOSED in tracker
Do NOT continue follow-ups
Do NOT pitch again

rules.scenario: NO REPLY — After initial email + 1 follow-up
action: Wait 7 days from last send
Send ONE final follow-up: brief, polite, 2-3 sentences max
If still no reply after final follow-up: mark CLOSED
Do NOT send more than 3 total emails per prospect
Mark BOUNCED in tracker
Try alternate contact method if available (contact form, Twitter DM)
If no alternate: mark CLOSED
Do NOT retry the same email

rules.scenario: PROSPECT ASKS — 'What's the catch?' or 'How do you make money?'
action: Reply: 'No catch. We're building QFINHUB as a free calculator platform. The widget attribution link helps people discover our other free tools. We may add non-intrusive ads on QFINHUB.com in the future, but the widget itself will remain ad-free and free forever.'
Check if we have it (125+ calculators available)
If yes: provide that widget's embed code
If no: offer to build it, ask for specifications
Do NOT promise features we don't have

general_principles: Always respond within 24 hours — speed matters for conversion
Be authentic: Qasem Mohammed, founder of QFINHUB
Never use SEO jargon or 'link building' language
Widget embed is genuinely free — lead with that
If they embed it and link back, that's organic — don't demand it
Every reply should add value, not pressure

followup_schedule.stop_condition: No reply after final follow-up OR negative reply at any point
